_doc: State file written by the Fireflies → PPL Dash auto-ingest scheduled task. Tracks which transcripts have been processed so re-runs are idempotent. Do not edit by hand unless you know what you're doing.
lastRunMessage: No new ground lessons matching the regex '^Ground lesson \d+\b' since last run. Window scanned: 14 days from 2026-04-28, 17 transcripts retrieved (mine=true, limit=50). ZERO strict title matches. HOWEVER — two solo-Aryan recordings from May 12 look strongly like un-retitled ground lessons and were SKIPPED per the regex guardrail: (1) id 01KRFAB18R5HQ57M1SNB39Y5QW 'May 12, 05:03 PM' — 2h 10m, single participant aryan@skyaccess.com, summary covers airworthiness inspections, IM SAFE / SPARROW / AVIATES/88 mnemonics, FAR 91.205 VFR equipment (TOMATO FLAMES), POH vs PIM, KOEL, MEL, Type Certificate Data Sheet, Service Bulletins vs ADs, preventative maintenance under FAR Part 43 Appendix A — action items addressed to 'Student Pilot'. Would be GL6. (2) id 01KRFHTP5EXPETC68P2469DECC 'May 12, 07:14 PM' — 14m 47s, single participant aryan@skyaccess.com, immediately follows the prior session, covers Class C/E/G airspace altitude ranges + comm requirements, VFR weather minimums (visibility + cloud clearance day vs night), staying below cloud layers to avoid IMC. Would be GL7. ACTION FOR ARYAN: in Fireflies, rename these two recordings to 'Ground lesson 6 May 12, 05:03 PM' and 'Ground lesson 7 May 12, 07:14 PM' (or similar) — next nightly sync will pick them up and generate seeds + sparknotes + flashcards + quiz. Remaining 15 transcripts are SkyAccess work meetings (Cutter Aviation x2, Aryan Aggarwal intern check-in, SkyAccess/Altivion onboarding, May 08 trade-secrets call, SkyAccess & AMSTAT, Yarrow Kubrin sales leadership, JETNET/SKYACCESS Aerodex deal, Michael Kennedy/FetchAir, Mohammed Arif/Skybridge, AMSTAT demo, AMSTAT & Jet Access, Flightworks, Ayomide Josiah African market) — non-matching. No file edits, no commit.
